item.title: US and UK release 10-point roadmap to align stablecoin and tokenized-asset oversight across the world's two largest financial markets
US OCC publishes stablecoin framework under GENIUS Act ahead of July 18 implementation deadline
SEC plans to propose Regulation Crypto this month, creating exemptions from securities rules for certain digital asset activities
US Treasury sanctions four Iran central bank crypto wallets; Tether freezes $131M in TRON-based USDT
White House schedules senior-level meeting to resolve CLARITY Act stalemate ahead of planned Senate vote
Ostium loses $18M in oracle attack as manipulated price data triggers USDC payout from DeFi vault
Morgan Stanley completes spot crypto rollout on E*Trade, giving 8.6 million customers access to BTC, ETH, and SOL
Australia's AML/CTF Travel Rule, live July 1, mandates identity and wallet verification for all regulated crypto transfers
US spot Ether ETFs attract $96M in three days, with BlackRock's fund capturing the large majority of inflows
JPMorgan increased its Bitcoin ETF stake 64% to $343M in Q1 2026, per a new SEC filing
Stablecoin supply surged $4B after GENIUS Act enactment as banks and asset managers begin issuing dollar tokens
SEC moves to modernize 20-year-old ATS rules to allow blockchain-based securities trading by Wall Street firms
Basel Committee's 1,250% risk weight for unbacked crypto assets is now active across member jurisdictions as of January 2026
Galaxy Digital cuts odds of CLARITY Act passing in 2026 to 50%, citing shrinking Senate calendar and unresolved policy disputes
